title: Mediation Agreement
description: Agreement to submit an ongoing dispute to mediation, establishing mediator neutrality and confidentiality.
whatsCovered: Appointment of mediator and session schedules
Mediator neutrality: mediator cannot act as counsel for either party
Strict confidentiality: mediation files are inadmissible in lawsuits
Split of mediator retainer and facility fees
Procedure for drafting binding settlement agreements
whenToUse: Use this mediation contract before starting mediation sessions to ensure all disclosures remain strictly inadmissible in court.

clauses.heading: MEDIATION AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the Mediation Agreement. The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. Mediator Retainers
clauses.body: Parties appoint mediator: {mediator_name}. All mediation communication remains confidential. Mediator fees shall be shared matching split: {mediator_fee_split}.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
